title: dactylorhiza majalis var. scotica
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis var. scotica, also known as the Scottish marsh-orchid, is a subspecies of the Dactylorhiza majalis orchid, native to the United Kingdom and Ireland. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat various health issues due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis var. scotica include its potential to reduce blood pressure, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used to aid in the treatment of colds, fever, and digestive issues.
